message:
style(vdbe): additional clippy lint fixes and test cleanup

## codegen.rs
- Add clippy::too_many_lines to allow list for try_emit_complex_in_subquery
  (function is complex but logically coherent, splitting would reduce clarity)
- Convert schema match to let-else pattern for consistency

## engine.rs
- Remove redundant assertions in tests that duplicate constraint checks
  The test already validates the constraint error is returned; additional
  row count assertions after an error are unnecessary

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
